'''wojabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:coagulant|coagulant]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-j-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coagulant|coagulant]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wojabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wojabithi|wojabithi]] || [[word:wojabiji|wojabiji]] || [[word:wojabishi|wojabishi]] || [[word:wojabiki|wojabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wojabuthuthu|wojabuthuthu]] || [[word:wojabujuju|wojabujuju]] || [[word:wojabushushu|wojabushushu]] || [[word:wojabukuku|wojabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wojabuthu|wojabuthu]] || [[word:wojabuju|wojabuju]] || [[word:wojabushu|wojabushu]] || [[word:wojabuku|wojabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wojabufthuf|wojabufthuf]] || [[word:wojabufjuf|wojabufjuf]] || [[word:wojabufshuf|wojabufshuf]] || [[word:wojabufkuf|wojabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wojabethe|wojabethe]] || [[word:wojabeje|wojabeje]] || [[word:wojabeshe|wojabeshe]] || [[word:wojabeke|wojabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wojabothotho|wojabothotho]] || [[word:wojabojojo|wojabojojo]] || [[word:wojaboshosho|wojaboshosho]] || [[word:wojabokoko|wojabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wojabotho|wojabotho]] || [[word:wojabojo|wojabojo]] || [[word:wojabosho|wojabosho]] || [[word:wojaboko|wojaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wojabofthof|wojabofthof]] || [[word:wojabofjof|wojabofjof]] || [[word:wojabofshof|wojabofshof]] || [[word:wojabofkof|wojabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wojabÃŸfthÃŸf|wojabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wojabÃŸfjÃŸf|wojabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wojabÃŸfshÃŸf|wojabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wojabÃŸfkÃŸf|wojabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wojabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|wojabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wojabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|wojabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wojabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|wojabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wojabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|wojabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wojabÃŸfthÃŸf|wojabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wojabÃŸfjÃŸf|wojabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wojabÃŸfshÃŸf|wojabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wojabÃŸfkÃŸf|wojabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wojabÃŸfthÃŸf|wojabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wojabÃŸfjÃŸf|wojabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wojabÃŸfshÃŸf|wojabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wojabÃŸfkÃŸf|wojabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wojabÃḊthÃḊ|wojabÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:wojabÃḊjÃḊ|wojabÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:wojabÃḊshÃḊ|wojabÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:wojabÃḊkÃḊ|wojabÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wojabathatha|wojabathatha]] || [[word:wojabajaja|wojabajaja]] || [[word:wojabashasha|wojabashasha]] || [[word:wojabakaka|wojabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wojabatha|wojabatha]] || [[word:wojabaja|wojabaja]] || [[word:wojabasha|wojabasha]] || [[word:wojabaka|wojabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wojabafthaf|wojabafthaf]] || [[word:wojabafjaf|wojabafjaf]] || [[word:wojabafshaf|wojabafshaf]] || [[word:wojabafkaf|wojabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wojabasha|wojabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wojabshÃḋsha|wojabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wojabrosha|wojabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wojabmusha|wojabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wojabyasha|wojabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowojabnkshÃḋsha|gowojabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowojabnkrosha|gowojabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowojabnkmusha|gowojabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowojabnkyasha|gowojabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wojajabasha|wojajabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wojajabshÃḋsha|wojajabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wojajabrosha|wojajabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wojajabmusha|wojajabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wojajabyasha|wojajabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowojajabnkshÃḋsha|gowojajabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowojajabnkrosha|gowojajabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowojajabnkmusha|gowojajabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowojajabnkyasha|gowojajabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wejÃḊbasha|wejÃḊbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wejÃḊbshÃḋsha|wejÃḊbshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wejÃḊbrosha|wejÃḊbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wejÃḊbmusha|wejÃḊbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wejÃḊbyasha|wejÃḊbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowejÃḊbnkshÃḋsha|gowejÃḊbnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowejÃḊbnkrosha|gowejÃḊbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowejÃḊbnkmusha|gowejÃḊbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowejÃḊbnkyasha|gowejÃḊbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wojfabasha|wojfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wojfabshÃḋsha|wojfabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wojfabrosha|wojfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wojfabmusha|wojfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wojfabyasha|wojfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowojfabnkshÃḋsha|gowojfabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowojfabnkrosha|gowojfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowojfabnkmusha|gowojfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowojfabnkyasha|gowojfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
